LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JEFFREY LEVIN'S HEARING ON PETITION FOR ADMINSTRATIVE WRIT WILL BE HEARD BY JUDGE KRAMER IN DEPARTMENT 303. COUNSEL ARE TO CONTACT HIS CLERK AT 551-3726 TO ARRANGE A DATE FOR A HEARING. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

NOT REPORTED. HEARING ON PETITION FOR ADMINISTRATIVE WRIT HELD ON JUN-21-2013, IN DEPT. 303. COUNSEL SUBMITS ORAL ARGUMENTS. THE COURT GRANTS THE PETITION FOR ADMINISTRATIVE WRIT. COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE THE WRITTEN ORDER. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; DEPT. 303.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER LEVIN LCS, JEFFREY SELIG RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT BOARD OF BEHAVIORAL SCIENCES STATE OF CALIFORNIA A PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDAMUS SHALL ISSUE FROM THE COURT, REMANDING THE PROCEEDINGS TO RESPONDENT AND COMMANDING RESPONDENT TO SET ASIDE ITS DECISION OF APRIL 5, 2012, IN THE ADMINISTRATIVE PROCEEDINGS ENTITLED IN THE MATTER OF THE ACCUSATION AGAINST: JEFFREY SELIG LEVIN, CASE NO. LC-2009-284, OAH NO. 2011040768. - SEE SCANNED DOC

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER JEFFREY LEVIN's Hearing On Petition For Adminstrative Writ will be heard by Judge Kramer in Department 303. Counsel are to contact his clerk at 551-3726 to arrange a date for a hearing. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
